---
artifact_id: FIX-U01
pair_id: FIX-U01
lang: fr
pair_revision: 2
technical_contract:
  outcomes: [CO-UNKNOWN]
  equations: ["V = 2 I R"]
  values: {R1: "1 kΩ"}
  safety_limits: {voltage_max: "24 V"}
  expected_ranges: {current: "9-11 mA"}
  rubric_total: 10
  answer_key_digest: sha256:bbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbb
  figure_ids: [FIG-FIX-1]
---

# Défaillance AQ injectée

Le défaut est intentionnel.
